title: Ocellochloa gardneri
taxonomy: Ocellochloa gardneri is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a member of the tribe Paniceae and the subfamily Panicoideae. The genus Ocellochloa is closely related to the genus Echinochloa. The classification of Ocellochloa gardneri is still being researched and may be subject to change. Further study is needed to confirm its exact taxonomic position within the family Poaceae.
